case_title: CHASE BANK USA N.A. VS. RUSLAN SPEKTOR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPEKTOR, RUSLAN $24,809.35 PRINCIPAL, $319.46 INTEREST, $388.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,516.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $388.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SPEKTOR, RUSLAN
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A. SERVED APR-26-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SPEKTOR, RUSLAN
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SPEKTOR, RUSLAN
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SPEKTOR, RUSLAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-19-2010
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA N.A.
